subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My glory! In thy letter which Varqá - upon him be My glory - forwarded, mention was made of Nabíl-i-Akbar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی در نامه شما که ورقا علیه بهائی ارسال نموده ذکر نبیل اکبر
subcodes.subjects: @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort
